summary: This is a brief promotional post announcing three upcoming speaking events in New York City where Cathy O'Neil will discuss her book 'Weapons of Math Destruction.' The events span from mid-October 2016 and include talks at Thoughtworks (co-hosted with Data-Pop Alliance), Betaworks, and Data & Society. The post provides practical details like dates, times, locations, and registration links for each event. It's primarily logistical rather than substantive in nature.
key_points: O'Neil is actively promoting 'Weapons of Math Destruction' through a New York speaking tour
The events include panel discussions with academics from Columbia and MIT Media Lab
Data & Society event features a 'Databite' format with whiskey
The post demonstrates O'Neil's engagement with the tech and data ethics community in NYC
money_quotes: if the world of New York City data hasn't gotten sick of hearing from me
key_insight: This is an event announcement post with minimal analytical content, primarily serving to publicize O'Neil's book tour appearances in New York.
